title: Melted Silky Russian Tomato Pilaf
description: A funky, silky, and cozy Russian dish featuring tinned tomatoes, caramelized onions, and macrobiotic-friendly ingredients, perfect for a cold winter night.
instructions: Heat the oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the sliced onions and cook until caramelized, stirring occasionally.
Add the crushed tomatoes, salt, black pepper, thyme, and garlic powder, and stir to combine.
Add the brown rice to the saucepan and stir to combine with the tomato mixture.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 20 minutes or until the rice is cooked and the liquid has been absorbed.
Fluff the pilaf with a fork and serve hot.
Garnish with chopped fresh herbs, if desired.
Serve with a side of steamed vegetables or a green salad, if desired.
